title: Block Variants - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Bring the variety of Block Variants to Biomes O' Plenty
body:
![Wood Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KOd7pM7X/images/1c1eebb9d4508b898754551716256e6d3627e5ae.png)

**Block Variants - Biomes O' Plenty**, the long awaited expansion that extends the variety of [Block Variants](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-variants) to [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty).  
Just like the original Block Variants, this expansion provides you with tons of new blocks that Biomes O' Plenty has been missing, like all the log stairs, slabs and walls, giving you even more creative freedom.

[![Our Discord Server](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/837670782753832991/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.com/invite/hwA9dd5bVh)
